limitations.title: Adapter coverage is limited to nmap XML and nuclei JSONL
limitations.impact: common consultant exports such as Burp Suite Pro, ZAP, Nessus, ffuf, sqlmap, SARIF, and Metasploit still require follow-up adapter work
limitations.workaround: Use the implemented nmap and nuclei importers, or keep unsupported exports as raw engagement evidence outside normalized reports until their adapter issues are complete.

limitations.title: Burp Suite Pro Issues XML ingestion is not implemented yet
limitations.impact: Burp request and response evidence cannot yet be normalized into report findings
limitations.workaround: Track the Burp adapter issue and require real Burp Pro exported XML fixtures before implementation.

limitations.title: WeasyPrint PDF rendering depends on system libraries
limitations.impact: PDF rendering can fail on machines without WeasyPrint native dependencies
limitations.workaround: Use `piranesi report --format pdf --pdf-backend reportlab` for the deterministic fallback renderer.

limitations.title: Retest fallback matching intentionally requires reviewer attention for ambiguous matches
limitations.impact: renamed or duplicated findings may be marked ambiguous instead of automatically classified
limitations.workaround: Review `ambiguous_matches` in retest JSON and adjust source evidence or normalized finding state before final delivery.

limitations.title: Phase 1 does not run scanners or perform active testing
limitations.impact: operators must run tools such as nmap and nuclei outside Piranesi and import their exports
limitations.workaround: Use authorized external tool runs, store the exports, then ingest them into a Piranesi workspace.
